Name: Sitecore Unicorn Sync
Description: Syncs all the specified configurations via the Unicorn remote sync PowerShell script. Uses the newer MicroChap security layer. Please see the following post for instructions: http://www.sitecorenutsbolts.net/2016/03/14/Octopus-Deploy-Step-for-Unicorn-Sync/

Parameters.Name: SharedSecret
Parameters.Label: Shared Secret
Parameters.HelpText: The shared secret used for the MicroChap handshake

Parameters.Name: SiteUrl
Parameters.Label: Site Url
Parameters.HelpText: The Url of your content authoring system. Must be able to view `/unicorn.aspx`

Parameters.Name: MicroChap
Parameters.Label: MicroCHAP DLL Location
Parameters.HelpText: The location of the MicroCHAP.dll file in your project
